title: Add user authentication system
description: Implement Supabase Auth: Email/password login and registration, social login (Google/GitHub) optional, user roles (masyarakat, donor, government, NGO, admin), profile management, protected routes, auth context provider.
close_reason: Completed: AuthContext, AuthModal, login/signup with Supabase Auth, user menu in header

title: Create database schema for Supabase
description: Complete PostgreSQL schema for Supabase with: 9 tables (users, recovery_points, photo_updates, needs, assistance_offers, matches, transactions, comments, notifications), PostGIS for geospatial queries, ENUMs for status/category types, indexes for performance, Row Level Security (RLS) policies, triggers for updated_at, helper functions. File: supabase-schema.sql
close_reason: Completed: supabase-schema.sql with all tables, RLS, and functions

title: Wire up comments to Supabase database
description: Replace mock posting with actual Supabase database integration: Save comments to comments table, fetch real comments from database, add real-time subscriptions for new comments, integrate with user authentication, add moderation capabilities.
close_reason: Completed: CommentForm and CommentsList connected to Supabase with real-time hooks

title: Create Supabase storage bucket for photos
description: Create the recovery-photos storage bucket in Supabase for storing uploaded images with proper RLS policies
close_reason: Completed: recovery-photos storage bucket created

title: Create Product Requirements Document (PRD)
description: Comprehensive PRD for KawalBencana platform including: Executive Summary, Problem Statement, Goals & Success Metrics, Target Users (5 categories), Core Features (7 features), Technical Architecture, Database Schema (9 entities), Tech Stack recommendations, Implementation Phases (Week 1-20+), Budget estimates, Go-to-market strategy, Risk management.
close_reason: Completed: PRD.md created with comprehensive documentation

title: Build analytics dashboard
description: Create dashboard page with: Key metrics cards (total points, completion rate, funds), charts for progress over time, regional comparison, recent activities feed, heatmap overlay on map.

title: Setup Supabase project and configure environment
description: Create Supabase project, configure credentials in .env.local, run database schema, create storage bucket for photos with policies, enable email authentication. This is a BLOCKING task - all backend features depend on this.
notes: Migration file ready: supabase/migrations/001_create_comments_and_photos.sql - Run in Supabase SQL Editor to create tables and storage bucket
close_reason: Completed: Supabase fully configured - tables, RLS policies, and storage bucket all working

title: Fix: Missing favicon.ico (404 error)
description: Browser requests /favicon.ico but file doesn't exist, causing 404 error in console.
close_reason: Fixed: Rewrote RecoveryMap using vanilla Leaflet with proper React 18 strict mode handling. Added SVG favicon.

title: Implement photo upload form with compression
description: Photo upload form with: Drag and drop file picker (react-dropzone), image preview, automatic client-side compression (browser-image-compression, max 1MB), file validation (type, size), description field with character count, location verification checkbox, upload progress states, success/error feedback. Files: src/components/recovery/PhotoUploadForm.tsx
close_reason: Completed: Photo upload form with compression and validation working (UI only)

title: Create recovery point detail modal
description: Full detail modal with 3 tabs (Overview, Photos, Comments): Progress section with percentage bar, budget breakdown (estimated/actual/remaining), location with coordinates, damage description, timestamps, status badges, responsive design. Files: src/components/recovery/RecoveryPointDetail.tsx
close_reason: Completed: Detail modal with 3 tabs fully functional

title: Write Supabase setup guide documentation
description: Comprehensive step-by-step guide for Supabase setup: Account creation, project setup, credentials retrieval, environment variables configuration, SQL schema execution, storage bucket creation with policies, authentication setup, verification checklist, troubleshooting. Files: SUPABASE_SETUP_GUIDE.md, SUPABASE_CHECKLIST.md
close_reason: Completed: Setup guides and checklists written

title: Create mock data for recovery points, photos, and comments
description: Realistic mock data in Bahasa Indonesia: 12 recovery points across Aceh, Sumut, Sumbar with real coordinates, 13 photo updates for 6 recovery points, 12 comments for 5 recovery points, helper functions for data retrieval. Files: src/utils/data/mockRecoveryPoints.ts, src/utils/data/mockPhotoUpdates.ts, src/utils/data/mockComments.ts
close_reason: Completed: All mock data created for recovery points, photos, comments

title: Build photo timeline component
description: Photo timeline viewer with: Large photo display (16:9), navigation arrows, photo counter badge, thumbnail grid with dates, progress bar for documentation, before/after comparison (2 photos), verification badges, responsive design. Files: src/components/recovery/PhotoTimeline.tsx
close_reason: Completed: Photo timeline with navigation and comparison working

title: Wire up photo upload to Supabase Storage
description: Replace mock upload with actual Supabase Storage integration: Upload compressed images to recovery-photos bucket, save photo metadata to photo_updates table, require authentication, handle errors and retries, show real-time photo updates after upload.
close_reason: Completed: PhotoUploadForm connected to Supabase Storage with image compression and metadata saving

title: Build interactive recovery map with Leaflet
description: Full-screen interactive map page at /map with: OpenStreetMap tiles, 12 colored markers for recovery points, custom marker icons by infrastructure category, auto-fit bounds, filter sidebar for status/damage/category, real-time filtering, responsive design, legend component. Files: src/app/map/page.tsx, src/components/map/RecoveryMap.tsx, src/components/map/MapFilters.tsx
close_reason: Completed: Map page with Leaflet, filters, and 12 markers working

title: Fix: Map container already initialized error
description: React Leaflet throws 'Map container is already initialized' error on page load. Need to add proper cleanup or use key prop to prevent re-initialization.
close_reason: Fixed: Rewrote RecoveryMap using vanilla Leaflet with proper React 18 strict mode handling. Added SVG favicon.

title: Build comments system UI
description: Comments system with: Comment form with validation (10-500 chars), character counter, comments list with avatars/initials, official badges for admin/NGO/gov users, relative timestamps in Indonesian, empty states, mock posting with success animation. Files: src/components/recovery/CommentForm.tsx, src/components/recovery/CommentsList.tsx, src/types/comment.ts
close_reason: Completed: Comments form and list with mock data working (UI only)

title: Create Supabase comments table
description: Create the comments table in Supabase with proper schema for storing user comments on recovery points. Fields: id, user_id, recovery_point_id, content, created_at
close_reason: Completed: comments table created and schema fixed (recovery_point_id changed to VARCHAR)

title: Build Needs Board feature
description: Create needs matching system: Post assistance needs (capital, equipment, training, etc.), create assistance offers, smart matching algorithm, verification flow, transaction tracking, impact reporting.

title: Create shadcn/ui component library
description: Manually created shadcn/ui components: Button, Card, Badge, Dialog, Tabs, Progress, Separator, Input, Textarea. All styled with Tailwind CSS variables for theming. Files: src/components/ui/*.tsx
close_reason: Completed: All shadcn/ui components created and styled

title: Enable real-time updates with Supabase
description: Add Supabase real-time subscriptions: Auto-refresh photos when new upload, live comment updates, optimistic updates for better UX, connection status handling.
close_reason: Completed: useSupabaseData hooks with real-time subscriptions for comments and photos

title: Project initialization with Next.js 15, TypeScript, and Tailwind
description: Initialize the KawalBencana project with modern tech stack: Next.js 15.0.4 with App Router, TypeScript 5+ strict mode, Tailwind CSS 3.4+ with shadcn/ui, React 19 with React Compiler, TanStack Query, Leaflet, Supabase client, ESLint + Prettier.
close_reason: Completed: Project initialized with all dependencies and configurations

title: Deploy to Netlify and configure kawalbencana.com domain
description: Deployed KawalBencana to Netlify (not Vercel due to boycott). Configured kawalbencana.netlify.app subdomain. Domain kawalbencana.com pending - waiting for Replit Support to update nameservers to Netlify DNS (dns1-4.p02.nsone.net). Support ticket submitted.
close_reason: Completed: App deployed to kawalbencana.netlify.app. Custom domain kawalbencana.com configured in Netlify DNS, pending Replit Support nameserver update.

title: Create Supabase photo_updates table
description: Create the photo_updates table in Supabase for storing photo uploads. Fields: id, recovery_point_id, image_url, thumbnail_url, uploaded_by, upload_date, description, verification_status, geolocation_verified, created_at
close_reason: Completed: photo_updates table created and schema fixed (recovery_point_id changed to VARCHAR)

title: Update kawalbencana.com nameservers (waiting on Replit Support)
description: Waiting for Replit Support to update nameservers for kawalbencana.com to Netlify DNS servers: dns1.p02.nsone.net, dns2.p02.nsone.net, dns3.p02.nsone.net, dns4.p02.nsone.net. Support ticket submitted on 2024-12-31. Once updated, domain will auto-propagate within 24 hours and Netlify will provision SSL.
